data.text: # (Optional) Replace or delete the style reference  👉

A clean whiteboard-style infographic for a project pitch called
  "OrganicGrowth." Hand-drawn marker aesthetic on a white background, like
  a smart sketch on a glass whiteboard — neat, minimal, lots of breathing
  room. Flat 2D, no photorealism, no gradients, no shadows.
  Strict 4-color palette only: red, blue, yellow, and green marker tones,
  plus thin black ink for outlines and labels. Nothing else.
  Hand-lettered title across the top: "OrganicGrowth — your weekly content
  engine on autopilot."
  On the left, header "THE PROBLEM": a small sketch of one tired person
  surrounded by 5 chaotic task icons floating around them — a magnifying
  glass (research), a lightbulb (ideas), a video camera (filming), an
  upload arrow (publishing), a bar chart (measuring). A scribbled label
  underneath reads: "5 jobs, every week — too much for one person." Use red
  and yellow for emphasis here.
  On the right, header "THE TECH STACK": a clean vertical stack of 5
  labeled layers, like building blocks, each a simple hand-drawn box with
  an icon and short caption:
  1. "Claude Code — AI agents run the loop" (blue)
  2. "Node.js backend — TypeScript, state in plain files "
  (red)
  3. "Apify — scrapes trends + performance" (green)
  4. "Magnific MCP — turns ideas into finished Reels with Happy Horse" (yellow)
  5. "Alibaba Cloud — always-on, in the cloud (future)" (blue) 
  
  A small hand-drawn arrow points from the left to the right with the label
  "automated." A tiny banner at the bottom reads: "Generates the video —
  you publish it."

data.text:
A clean whiteboard-style infographic explaining "OrganicGrowth" — a
  per-Brand content automation loop. Hand-drawn marker aesthetic on a white
  background, like a smart sketch on a glass whiteboard — neat, minimal,
  lots of breathing room. Flat 2D, no photorealism, no gradients, no
  shadows.
  Strict 4-color palette only: red, blue, yellow, and green marker tones,
  plus thin black ink for outlines and labels. Nothing else.
  Visual key, drawn small in a top corner: a robot head = "AI agents"
  (blue), a person = "You" (red), a wrench/plug = "Tool" (green), yellow
  for the connecting arrows.
  Hand-lettered title across the top: "The agents do the work. You make the
  calls. For every Brand you run."
  Across the top, draw 3 small hand-drawn folder tabs labeled "Brand A",
  "Brand B", "Brand C", one pulled forward — caption: "each Brand has its
  own voice, trends + history."
  Below, a simple left-to-right flow of 4 big stages joined by yellow
  arrows, with a yellow feedback arrow curving back from the last stage to
  the first. Each stage is one clean hand-drawn box showing blue robots
  doing the work, a green tool where used, and a single red "YOU" decision:
  Stage 1 — "IDEAS" (blue): two little robots + a green "Apify" tool box.
  Caption: "agents scrape trends + write brand-fit ideas." Red gate at the
  end: "YOU approve."
  Stage 2 — "CASTING" (blue): a robot + a green "Magnific MCP" tool box
  generating a row of 3 character faces. Caption: "Magnific MCP creates
  characters." Red gate: "YOU pick one."
  Stage 3 — "PRODUCE" (blue): a robot + the green "Magnific MCP" tool box
  outputting a film reel, a thumbnail image, and a short caption line.
  Caption: "Magnific MCP renders a 24s Reel + thumbnail + social copy." Red
  gate: "YOU publish."
  Stage 4 — "GROW" (blue): a robot + the green "Apify" tool reading a bar
  chart. Caption: "the agent tracks results."
  The yellow feedback arrow from Stage 4 back to Stage 1 is labeled:
  "results sharpen next week's ideas."
  A tiny banner at the bottom, in red, reads: "You decide what goes live —
  the system never publishes on its own."
  Sketch-style, friendly, uncluttered, high contrast, plenty of white
  space. Wide infographic, 16:9 landscape.

data.text:
Seamlessly integrate the text **@lifehack **into the foreground (floor or surrounding objects, surfaces) or background (walls or similar) around the character so it is made of the **exact same material an d texture** as its surroundings in a very subtle manner. Whether on fabric, stone, or metal, the text must react naturally to the ambient lighting and shadows without looking like a digital overlay. The text angle should naturally follow the image composition. Use a Sans font style. The text must not cover more than 8% of the composition, and placed in the top 2/3 of the screen.

Do not modify anything else in the image composition.

instruction: Inline preview rendered when supported. Always give the user `space.webUrl` to open the board in the app. Do not paste raw JSON. When replying to the user, use names, titles, webUrl, and plain descriptions — do not quote internal identifiers (UUIDs, folder references, session or request ids) unless they explicitly ask.
